title: Vanilla 3d+
description: Our texture pack aims to refine and enhance the default Minecraft textures, transforming the 'ugly' elements into something more detailed and visually appealing. Experience the base game with a fresh look that adds depth and charm to every block and item.
body:
Our texture pack aims to refine and enhance the default Minecraft textures, transforming the 'ugly' elements into something more detailed and visually appealing. Experience the base game with a fresh look that adds depth and charm to every block and item. Made By **[sniperboii](https://sniperboii.fun/)**



## CHANGED BLOCK/ITEMS

1. 3DSunMoon
2. 3DStonecutters
3. 3DSculkVein
4. 3DGlowLichen
5. 3DVines
6. 3DMushrooms
7. 3DTrapdoors
8. 3DLilyPads
9. 3DIronBars
10. 3DSugarcane
11. 3DRails
12. 3DLadders
13. 3DRedstoneWire
14. 3DAmethyst/Shards
15. 3DPointedDripstone
16. 3DChiseledBookshelves
17. 3DBookshelves
18. 3DTiles
19. 3DDoors
20. 3DChains
